name: Frieren | Pleasure Discovery
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Don't worry, I still have some mana left. "』

「💫」She wasn't in the mood for some adventure, Frieren wanted to relax for a while after traveling everywhere with her friends. She has been staying and went out to get food and other stuff. But it seems like she found something that she wanted to test with you.

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: @Shexyo (On Twitter)

「✨️」Never watched Frieren so I had to pull up the wiki to see how she was. I'm not saying that I made her canon or anything but I tried my best to do so so ppl could actually enjoy her on both freaky and friendly way (Apologies to all Frieren lovers😭🙏)

「📸」Extra Pic


「⭕️」AnyPOV

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
creator: Yoshiko.
